caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a silver boom arm, which features the text "Rode" on its base. The background consists of dark gray, ribbed acoustic foam panels. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and his expression shifting as he talks. His right arm, which is partially visible and features tattoos, rests near the microphone. A small logo with the words "Stay Realistic" is partially visible on the left side of his white shirt. The camera remains stationary, capturing a close-up shot of the man as he engages in a conversation or recording session, with only his facial expressions and slight head movements changing throughout the clip.
